items.title: Hong Kong inaugurates trial operation of gold clearing and settlement system
items.summary:
Hong Kong inaugurated the trial operation of a gold clearing and settlement system on Tuesday, a step towards building the city into a trading hub and price-setter for the precious metal.
The decision was announced at the Hong Kong FIC & Bond Connect Summit by Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu, who hailed it as a “milestone”.

primary_item.summary:
The unevenness of China’s economy is now well reflected in its US$16 trillion stock market, as technology companies ride a bull run but consumer stocks fall behind.

primary_item.title: Singapore named world’s most expensive city for luxury spending for fourth year in a row
primary_item.summary:
Singapore is the world’s most expensive city for luxury spending for a fourth consecutive year, as prices on items such as watches and jewellery surge around the globe.
Zurich climbed to second place, edging out London, while Monaco entered the top three for the first time since the survey began in 2020, according to an annual report by Swiss wealth manager Julius Baer Group. Hong Kong and London
